metaDescription: Respite's command reference as specced: /respite status, reload, and the rest testing levers.
title: Commands
lede: The /respite command tree, as specced. Respite is in development; this is the surface the implementation will ship.

rows: Time-lapse state and effective rate, your time awake in days, Weary yes/no, nights until the next new moon — and the signal of a Chronometer you're looking at
Resets the target's time-since-rest to zero (clears Weariness)
Sets the target's time-since-rest — the testing lever for phantom and weariness thresholds
